description_long: This is a modern swivel chair featuring a tall, slightly curved backrest and a contoured seat, both upholstered in a deep burgundy fabric. The chair is supported by a single, sturdy central column that connects to a wide, circular black base, providing stability and allowing for smooth rotation. The seat and backrest are seamlessly integrated, with no visible separation or joints, giving the chair a sleek and minimalist appearance. The absence of armrests enhances its streamlined silhouette, making it suitable for compact urban environments. The materials suggest a combination of metal or reinforced plastic for the base and support, with cushioned fabric for comfort. Its design is both functional and stylish, ideal for use in offices, waiting areas, or modern public spaces.
description: A tall, burgundy-upholstered swivel chair with a curved backrest and a wide, circular black base. The chair has a sleek, armless design and a sturdy central support column.
description_view_0: Front view shows the tall, straight backrest and the wide, circular base directly beneath the seat.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the pronounced curve of the backrest and seat, as well as the thickness of the central support column.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the broad, flat backrest and the full width of the base, with no visible armrests or adjustment mechanisms.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again emphasizes the ergonomic curve of the seat and back, and the solid, round base.
attribute_central_support_column: A single, cylindrical black column made of metal or reinforced plastic, connecting the seat to a wide, circular base; appears fixed and sturdy.
attribute_seat_back_design: Tall, flat, and slightly curved backrest upholstered in burgundy fabric, extending seamlessly from the seat with no visible patterns or cutouts.
